```python
def solve(criteria):
    # Placeholder for the actual solution mechanism logic
    if not criteria:
        return []

    # Example logic to filter solution mechanisms based on criteria
    solution_mechanisms = [
        {"name": "Mechanism A", "type": "Type 1", "difficulty": "Easy"},
        {"name": "Mechanism B", "type": "Type 2", "difficulty": "Medium"},
        {"name": "Mechanism C", "type": "Type 1", "difficulty": "Hard"},
    ]

    filtered_solutions = []
    for mechanism in solution_mechanisms:
        if all(mechanism[key] == value for key, value in criteria.items() if key in mechanism):
            filtered_solutions.append(mechanism)

    return filtered_solutions
```
